title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Law, York, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Imu as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Undoubtedly lies in the letter UI left.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So, pray tell...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: was it a deliberate choice to only refer to her...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: As 'Queen UIU of House Refertari'?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go ahead and divulge the full name on her letter, as written!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've got me...!! I suppose there really is...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: ...No chance I'm leaving this room alive....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I take it that there is no fib I could tell...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That would satisfy you enough to let me go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your fate was decided the moment...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: You saw the great IMU.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not surprising... they can't let anyone know,the world's greatest taboo has been broken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The atmosphere here feels a little sinister... what's going on?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The truth is,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The letter from Arabasta's ruler eight centuries ago,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: was signed by...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "... "QUEEN NEFERTARY..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "D. LILL..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: leap

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fire FIST!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Smothered* mate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where did this one come from...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was hoping I'd be able to take you all out in one move...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: PANT, PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, there was no way I could've known that hell was located here, at the very top of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: AAH- WEEZ- WEEZ

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Luffy- KUN'S... BROTHER... AREN'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: KOFF.. KOFF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: YYOU ARE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOU'RE WITH THE REVELU- TIONARY ARMY AND YOU STILL STEPED IN TO SAVE ME?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our cause is more concerned with the monsters that sit above the kings and queens of the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Do you know Luffy somehow?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ..HE ONCE STEPED IN TO SAVE ME TOO.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ha ha! That sounds like him alright.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: LEAVE ME! I'M DEAD WEIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOU HAVE A BETTER CHANCE OF ESCAPING ON YOUR OWN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Not gonna happen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THERE'S SOMETHING I'VE COME TO UNDER- STAND.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND IF YOU DIE HERE, WELL BE IN TROUBLE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BECAUSE I NEED YOU TO DELNER A MESSAGE TO LIFFYKUN AND W.!.!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You want me to tell them some- thing?!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
